name: Churu Pops Cat Treat - Tuna Recipe
description: Give your cat a delicious, hydrating snack with Churu Pops Tuna Recipe . These soft jelly treats are crafted with 91% moisture , helping your cat stay healthy and hydrated while enjoying a savory, creamy flavor. Perfect for cats of all ages, from kittens to seniors, these low-calorie treats are a tasty way to reward your cat. Each tube contains only 6.5 calories and is made with wholesome ingredients including real tuna and natural flavors. Enriched with Vitamin E for immune support and green tea extract as a natural antioxidant, Churu Pops are a nutritious treat you can feel good about giving. The squeezable jelly format allows for interactive feeding straight from the tube , making snack time fun and engaging. These treats are grain-free, preservative-free, and contain no artificial colors . Key Features Hydrating jelly treats with 91% moisture Low-calorie – 6.5 kcal per tube Grain-free, preservative-free, and no artificial colors Soft, squeezable texture for feeding by hand Enriched with Vitamin E and green tea extract for health benefits Suitable for cats of all life stages Feeding Instructions Feed as a treat only. Not intended as a complete meal. Always provide clean, fresh water and consult your veterinarian regularly. Storage Instructions Refrigerate after opening and serve as soon as possible. Ingredients Water, Tuna, Natural Flavors, Agar-agar, Guar Gum, Natural Tuna Flavor, Xanthan Gum, Vitamin E Supplement, Green Tea Extract Guaranteed Analysis Crude Protein (min): 7.00% Crude Fat (min): 0.20% Crude Fiber (max): 0.30% Moisture (max): 91.00% Vitamin E (min): 310 IU/kg Calorie Content 430 kcal/kg | 6.5 kcal per tube (ME) Net Weight 2.16 oz (0.54 oz × 4 tubes)
